description_long: This object is a set of four modern vases, each with a unique, sculptural form. The vases feature elongated necks and bulbous bases, with some incorporating dramatic, organic cutouts and flowing curves. The surfaces are smooth and unadorned, giving a minimalist and contemporary aesthetic. The vases appear to be made from a ceramic or porcelain material, finished in a uniform matte gray color. Their abstract shapes make them suitable as decorative pieces in urban environments, such as public plazas or modern parks. The overall design emphasizes artistic expression and visual interest, making them stand out as statement pieces.
description: A group of four modern, sculptural vases with smooth, matte gray surfaces and abstract, flowing forms. Each vase features unique cutouts and elongated necks, creating a striking contemporary look.
description_view_0: The vases are seen from a narrow angle, highlighting the dramatic cutouts and the flowing, organic curves of the forms.
description_view_1: All four vases are visible side by side, showcasing their individual shapes and the differences in their neck lengths and base designs.
description_view_2: The vases are viewed from the opposite side, emphasizing the open, hollow sections and the interplay of negative space in the designs.
description_view_3: The vases are again shown side by side, but from the reverse angle, revealing the smooth backs and the continuity of their sculptural lines.
